scripts.start:device: REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=$(ifconfig en0 | awk '/inet /{print $2; exit}') expo start --dev-client --host lan --port 8081 --clear
scripts.ios:device: REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=$(ifconfig en0 | awk '/inet /{print $2; exit}') expo run:ios --device --port 8081
scripts.iphone:dev: REACT_NATIVE_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME=$(ifconfig en0 | awk '/inet /{print $2; exit}') expo run:ios --device --port 8081
